title: rubus noli-tangere
intro: Rubus noli-tangere, also known as the "touch-me-not" or "Sensitive Briar", is a type of flowering shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rubus noli-tangere include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Rubus noli-tangere include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
